creator: Moving Rainbow
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Moving Rainbow
chapter_title: Python Basics — Variables, Data Types, and Operators

learningObjectives: Students classify Python values by data type - given a displayed value, they select its type from six options and receive feedback that connects the type to an LED programming context.

assessmentOpportunities: Students explain the demonstrated relationship in their own words.
